data.title: Warner Bros. Discovery may reopen talks with Paramount after agreeing for a potential sale to Netflix.
data.description: Warner Bros. Discovery has recently reached an agreement to be acquired by Netflix. However, the contract includes a provision that allows Warner Bros. Discovery to explore other offers that could potentially result in a better deal. This move comes amidst a rapidly evolving media landscape, with the deal being of significant value, estimated to be in the billions of dollars. Warner Bros. Discovery will now assess all options available to them before making a final decision on the acquisition.

data.title: Maestro AI corrected article: Raises $1.2M Pre-Seed Round for Mortgage Operating System.
data.description: Maestro AI has successfully secured $1.2 million in a pre-seed funding round to develop an advanced operating system for mortgage origination. The funding was announced on 12-Feb-2026 by Maestro AI, indicating a significant milestone for the company's growth. The financial support will enable Maestro AI to enhance its capabilities in revolutionizing the mortgage origination process.
Tesla to avert 30-day license suspension in California following corrective measures, DMV says.

data.title: Caterpillar acquires RPMGlobal Holdings Limited, an Australian mining software company, to boost data-driven solutions.
data.description: In Irving, Texas, on February 17, 2026, Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) completed the acquisition of RPMGlobal Holdings Limited (ASX: RUL), a mining software firm from Australia. This move broadens Caterpillar's range of data-centric mining technology and software offerings. The acquisition marks a significant development for Caterpillar as it aims to enhance its position within the industry. This strategic decision will see Caterpillar's capabilities in this sector grow substantially, setting the stage for further advancements in the mining technology sphere.
US offers more details on claim China conducted secret nuclear weapons test-SCMP

data.title: Fortanix & NTT DATA partner to ensure data sovereignty & security for AI Factories using NVIDIA, solutions launched in 2026.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, the 2026 India AI Impact Summit revealed a new partnership between Fortanix and NTT DATA. Fortanix, known for data security in AI, and NTT DATA, a leader in AI digital services, joined forces to support enterprises in establishing secure, compliant AI Factories leveraging NVIDIA Confidential Computing. Through Fortanix® and NTT DATA's managed services, organizations can ensure the security of complex AI workloads and AI Factories, promoting sovereignty and compliance. This collaboration aims to empower enterprises in managing advanced AI operations securely and efficiently.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures drop as market fluctuates; Meta-Nvidia deal boosts Nvidia while AMD and Broadcom decline.
data.description: On Tuesday, the stock market, which had been divided, managed to reverse and end the day with slight gains. Nvidia saw an increase in its stock due to a recent deal with Meta related to artificial intelligence. However, AMD and Broadcom experienced declines in their stock prices. Following this, Dow Jones Futures fell, signaling a potential downturn after the market's reversal. The Meta deal proved beneficial for Nvidia but had a negative impact on its AI competitors.

data.title: $36B U.S. investments from Japan praised by Trump, part of $550B pledge for tariff relief and stronger ties.
data.description: Recent agreements worth $36 billion mark the initial phase of a $550 billion investment commitment. This commitment is focused on attaining tariff relief and maintaining strong relations with the United States.

data.title: CECO Environmental Corp to report Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 24, 2026 premarket with earnings call at 8:30 am ET. Website for details: www.cecoenviro.com.
data.description: CECO Environmental Corp, a prominent industrial company listed on Nasdaq as CECO, has disclosed that they are set to reveal their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 24, 2026, before the market opens. The earnings call is scheduled to commence at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (7:30 a.m. CT). The detailed financial figures and presentation will be available on the company's website, www.cecoenviro.com.
